model.low_cpu_mem_usage: Optimize for low CPU memory usage

info.restart_required: Some changes may require restarting the application. 🔁

help.ui_language: Select the language used by the application UI. New languages are detected automatically from the 'resources/locales' folder.
help.theme: Changes the UI theme. Actual styling will be applied later via QSS.
help.device: Select where the ASR model runs. 'GPU' uses CUDA when available (NVIDIA only).

precision.auto: Let the app choose the best precision for your device.
precision.float32: Highest quality and compatibility. Recommended for CPU.
precision.float16: Faster and lower VRAM usage on CUDA GPUs. Might reduce accuracy slightly.
precision.bfloat16: Similar to FP16, but supported only on some GPUs. More stable than FP16 when available.

help.tf32: TF32 is a fast matmul mode on modern NVIDIA GPUs (Ampere+). It can speed up inference with minimal quality impact.
help.model_name: Select a local model folder from 'resources/models'. Requires restart to fully reload the pipeline.
help.default_language: Optional language hint for transcription (e.g. 'en', 'pl'). Leave empty for automatic detection.
help.chunk_length: Audio chunk length used by the pipeline (seconds). Larger chunks may be faster, but increase memory usage.
help.stride_length: Overlap between chunks (seconds). Higher stride improves continuity, but adds extra work.
help.low_cpu_mem_usage: Reduces RAM usage during model loading (recommended).
help.output_format: Controls both the file extension and whether timestamps are included.
help.keep_downloaded_files: Keep temporary downloads for URL sources. Disable to save disk space.
help.keep_wav_temp: Keep intermediate WAV files created during preprocessing (for debugging).
help.download_audio_only: When transcribing URLs, download only audio instead of full video when possible.
help.min_video_height: Downloader: lower resolution limit for selected formats.
help.max_video_height: Downloader: upper resolution limit for selected formats.
help.retries: How many times to retry failed HTTP requests.
help.concurrent_fragments: Parallel fragment downloads. Higher values can be faster, but may stress the connection.

license.summary: This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License version 3 (GPL-3.0).
license.full_link: The full license text is available in the LICENSE file distributed with this application.

error.type_string_nonempty: ⚠️ Field "{field}" must be a non-empty string.
error.enum_invalid: ⚠️ Field "{field}" has invalid value "{value}". Allowed values: {allowed}
